title: citrus × natsudaidai
intro: Citrus × natsudaidai, also known as the Sudachi or Japanese sudachi, is a hybrid citrus plant that is native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve indigestion, and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include its potential to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Citrus × natsudaidai is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, often in combination with other herbs like ginger and peppermint.
